_comment: Files exempt from lint-sync-over-async.ps1. Category A = host-required synchronous bridge (the host calls us on a sync path and we must block); B = avoidable (should be fixed); C = test/helper. Add entries sparingly, always with a reason.

entries.reason: RecordExceptionOutcome is invoked from the host's synchronous exception-handling path; it hops to the thread pool via Task.Run before blocking on the handler's ValueTask so it cannot deadlock the host's single-threaded SynchronizationContext. Intentional, documented inline.
